KPI Bluebook

Key Performance Indicators:

  • SOx Emissions Concentration (kg/m3
  • Yield Percentage (%
  • Cooling Water Delta-T (°C
  • On-Spec Rate (%
  • Propylene to Ethylene (P/E) Ratio
  • kpi flare recovery pct
  • Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF
  • OEE %
  • Specific Catalyst Cost ($/ton
  • Polymer Melt Flow Index (MFI) Variance
  • Daily Feedstock Throughput (tons/day
  • Maintenance to Operating Cost Ratio
KPI Bluebook
  • On-Spec Rate (%
  • View page source

On-Spec Rate (%

\[\text{}\]
Open in: VS Code PyCharm Edit
Description
  • The On-Spec Rate (%) measures the percentage of production batches that meet quality specifications compared to the total number of batches produced
  • This KPI expresses the proportion of production that meets all quality standards relative to total batches
Objective
  • The objective of tracking the On-Spec Rate is to ensure product quality and compliance with industry standards
  • thereby minimizing rework and enhancing customer satisfaction
  • Improve first-pass quality and reduce rework or off-spec material by monitoring on-spec performance over time
Formula

The On-Spec Rate is calculated by dividing the number of on-spec batches by the total number of batches, then multiplying the result by 100 to express it as a percentage.

$$ \mathrm{On\text{-}Spec\,\%} = \frac{\mathrm{On\text{-}Spec\,Batches}}{\mathrm{Total\,Batches}} \times 100 $$
Generation time 0.0s (AI 0.0s + Render 0.0s)
Total: 0.001s • AI: 0.001s • Render: 0.001s
Extraction rate % 88.9%
Error rate % 11.1%
Used in KPI(s)
  • This KPI is utilized in quality control assessments
  • production efficiency evaluations
  • and overall operational performance metrics
Input Measure
  • The input measures for this KPI include the count of on-spec batches and the total count of batches produced during a specific time frame
  • Counts of on-spec batches and total batches in the measurement period
Unit of Measure The unit of measure for the On-Spec Rate is expressed as a percentage.
Reporting Source The data for this KPI is sourced from the batch quality summary, which aggregates quality metrics from production records.
Comments A high On-Spec Rate indicates effective quality control processes, while a low rate may signal issues in production or quality assurance that need to be addressed.

Code Context

1:emphasize-lines: 1
2
3
4-- KPI: On-Spec Rate (%)

– Formula: mathrm{Ontext{-}Spec,%} = frac{mathrm{Ontext{-}Spec,Batches}}{mathrm{Total,Batches}} times 100 CREATE VIEW kpi_on_spec_rate AS SELECT

CAST(100.0 * on_spec_batches / NULLIF(total_batches, 0) AS FLOAT) AS on_spec_percentage

FROM batch_quality_summary;
